page_metadata.biotools__summary: Provides knowledge-driven, fully interactive and intuitive access to multiple data sources. It displays maximum relevant information, while saving the user from drowning in the flood of data. Thus, allowing an interactive and explorative approach to the hunt for the candidate gene.
